allow: Bash(.venv/bin/python -c "from services.mock_data import get_symbol_info; from services.technical_analysis import build_indicators; from services.scenario_engine import build_scenarios; from services.risk_engine import calc_risk; from services.mock_data import generate_ohlcv; df = generate_ohlcv\('THYAO'\); print\('Mock data OK'\); print\(get_symbol_info\('THYAO'\)\); print\('Indicators OK:', list\(build_indicators\(df\).keys\(\)\)\); print\('Scenarios OK:', build_scenarios\(df\)['uncertainty_index']\); print\('Risk OK:', calc_risk\(df\)['rr_ratio_t1']\)")
